findings.message: Inline comment 'Chromium normalises the background shorthand...' is thorough and explains a non-obvious browser behaviour correctly — this is good WHY commenting per CLAUDE.md §2. No style issues.
The exclude array includes 'node_modules/**' which is Vitest's built-in default. It is harmless but redundant. Could be simplified to just ['e2e/**']. No functional issue.
